title: Gingerbread House Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA | Christmas Baking Tool | Medium 7-8cm | Holiday Cookie Shape
description:
Bring the magic of the holidays to your kitchen with our charming Gingerbread House Cookie Cutter! Whether you're baking a festive batch of Christmas cookies, decorating sugar cookies with the kids, or crafting the perfect gingerbread treats for a holiday party, this delightful cutter makes it easy to create perfectly shaped gingerbread house cookies every single time. Designed with clean, detailed edges, this cookie cutter captures the whimsical charm of a classic gingerbread house complete with a pitched roof, door, and windows — giving your cookies that instantly recognizable holiday silhouette that everyone loves.

Key Features:
• Precision-designed gingerbread house shape with crisp, clean cutting edges
• 3D printed with care and attention to detail for consistent, reliable results
• Comfortable grip depth for easy pressing into rolled cookie dough
• Lightweight yet sturdy construction that holds up through large baking sessions
• Designed to release dough cleanly, minimizing sticking and waste

Dimensions:
This is a Medium (M) size cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This is an ideal size for individual decorated cookies, perfect for gift bags, cookie platters, and holiday dessert tables. The cutting depth is designed to work beautifully with standard rolled cookie dough thickness.

How to Use:
For best results, roll your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 4-5mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the cookie cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift straight up. If the dough sticks to the cutter, try dipping the cutting edge in a light dusting of flour or chilling your dough for a few minutes before cutting. This cutter works wonderfully with sugar cookie dough, gingerbread dough, shortbread, and other firm rollout cookie recipes. For the crispest shapes, chill your cut cookies on the baking sheet for ten minutes before placing them in the oven.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under warm (not hot) water and gently remove any dough residue with a soft brush or cloth. Allow to air dry completely before storing. Avoid prolonged exposure to heat or direct sunlight, as PLA can warp at high temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will last for many baking seasons to come.

Perfect Gift Ideas:
This gingerbread house cookie cutter makes a wonderful gift for bakers of all skill levels and is perfect for so many occasions. Tuck it into a Christmas stocking for a fun and practical holiday surprise, or pair it with a favorite cookie recipe and some festive sprinkles for a thoughtful homemade gift basket. It's an excellent choice for housewarming gifts, teacher appreciation presents, Secret Santa exchanges, or birthday gifts for the baking enthusiast in your life. Kids and adults alike will love using this cutter to start new holiday baking traditions together.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is handmade with care, designed in-house, and 3D printed to order in small batches. We take pride in offering unique, high-quality baking tools that you won't find in ordinary stores. Because each piece is printed individually, you can be confident that your order receives personal attention from design to packaging, ensuring you receive a product we're truly proud of. Thank you for supporting our small creative business — happy baking!
